nodes.name: Hourly Schedule
nodes.notes: Spec docs/00 §8.3: scoring runs hourly over Lead Pool rows where Status = New or scoring needed.

nodes.name: Run Lead Scoring
nodes.notes: Primary path: run_lead_pipeline.py cleans, dedupes, scores (AI when a key is present, else local heuristic with review_needed=true), writes Lead Scoring rows and updates Lead Pool. Single-payload fallback: `python3 scripts/score_leads.py --json '<scoring json>'` validates one AI scoring payload. No secrets on the command line.

nodes.name: Scoring OK?
nodes.notes: Branch on the executeCommand exit code. exitCode 0 (or a parsed scoring payload without review_needed override) -> write back to Feishu. Anything else -> error handler.

nodes.name: Write Lead Scoring Row

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { fields: { 'Score ID': 'SCORE-' . $json.lead_id, 'Lead ID': $json.lead_id, 'Total Score': $json.total_score, 'Sourcing Need Score': $json.sourcing_need_score, 'Fulfillment Pain Score': $json.fulfillment_pain_score, 'Custom Packaging Score': $json.custom_packaging_score, 'Store Maturity Score': $json.store_maturity_score, 'Contactability Score': $json.contactability_score, 'ASG Service Fit Score': $json.asg_service_fit_score, 'Reasoning Summary': $json.reasoning_summary, 'Main Pain Point': $json.main_pain_point, 'Recommended Offer': $json.recommended_offer, 'Risk': $json.risk, 'Review Needed': $json.review_needed } } }}

nodes.notes: Success path (1 of 2): persist the auditable scoring breakdown to the Lead Scoring table. Field names match docs/02 §6.3 exactly. Table id and base token come from $env, never literals. Only runs after scoring JSON validates.

nodes.name: Update Lead Pool Score
nodes.notes: Success path (2 of 2): denormalize the total score onto Lead Pool and advance Status New -> Scored. Fields per docs/02 §6.1. Status is set to 'Scored' only; this workflow never sends outreach (handled by 04, draft-only).

nodes.name: Scoring Error Handler
nodes.notes: Error path: any AI/JSON/Feishu failure lands here, review_needed is forced true, and the row is routed to manual review per docs/00 §8.3 acceptance (parse failure -> human review). No retry storms, no silent drop. Wire this node's output to a notification/Feishu group node in production.

meta.asg_boundary: AI lead scoring is audit/draft only: scores write to Lead Scoring + Lead Pool (ASG Fit Score, Priority, Status=Scored). This workflow NEVER sends outreach, never auto-messages leads, and never publishes content. On AI/JSON failure the lead is routed to human review (review_needed=true) rather than auto-acted-on. All secrets via $env; no literal credentials or table ids.
